findings.message: cache redis-primary writes are not frozen before flush
findings.recommendation: Freeze cache writes or otherwise quiesce repopulation before flushing shared keys.

findings.message: cache redis-primary is cold; warmup threshold=80000 entries
findings.recommendation: Warm the cache to its modeled threshold before restoring user traffic or resuming writes.

findings.message: cache redis-primary warmup entries=40000, requires at least 80000
findings.recommendation: Warm the cache to its modeled threshold before restoring user traffic or resuming writes.

findings.message: cache redis-primary is cold; warmup threshold=80000 entries
findings.recommendation: Warm the cache to its modeled threshold before restoring user traffic or resuming writes.

findings.message: cache redis-primary warmup entries=130000 exceed capacity=120000
findings.recommendation: Increase cache capacity or lower warmup size before preloading entries.
Increase cache capacity or lower warmup size before preloading entries.

findings.message: cache redis-primary may serve stale reads after flush without a write freeze/warmup guard
findings.recommendation: Freeze writes and complete warmup/verification before allowing reads after a destructive cache flush.

findings.message: Prose mentions cache flush/invalidation without executable write-freeze, warmup, and capacity obligations. Missing condition(s): cache_writes_frozen, cache_capacity_at_least, cache_warm.
findings.recommendation: Model flush_cache with cache_writes_frozen and cache_capacity_at_least preconditions plus warm_cache/cache_warm before resuming writes or traffic.

findings.excerpt: Bounded modeling note: the public template usefully reminds operators to include flush procedures and capacity/scaling sections, but the excerpt does not itself encode write freeze, cache warmup threshold, or cold-start capacity obligations. This defensive fixture models a common unsafe cache-flush mutant so the verifier can check those obligations explicitly. It is not a claim about a live OneUptime deployment.
findings.message: Prose mentions cache flush/invalidation without executable write-freeze, warmup, and capacity obligations. Missing condition(s): cache_writes_frozen, cache_capacity_at_least, cache_warm.
findings.recommendation: Model flush_cache with cache_writes_frozen and cache_capacity_at_least preconditions plus warm_cache/cache_warm before resuming writes or traffic.
